title: Simple Redstone Torches
description: This pack makes a simple change, Redstone Torches are now similar in color to other Redstone components while maintaining the style of other Torches.
body:
A simple Redstone Torches retexture. Nothing more, nothing less.

This pack makes a simple change, Redstone Torches are now similar in color to other Redstone components while maintaining the style of other Torches.
